ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the project was initiated */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the project is based */,
  "incentive_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of economic incentive provided */,
  "term" INTEGER /* Term of the project in years */,
  "projected_jobs" INTEGER /* Projected number of jobs created over the term */,
  "projected_state_tax_revenue" TEXT /* Projected new state tax revenue over the term */,
  "projected_capital_investment" TEXT /* Projected capital investment in the facility */,
  "projected_state_wages" TEXT /* Projected new state wages */,
  "maximum_incentive_earned" TEXT /* Maximum cap on incentives earned over the term */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "actual_jobs_created" INTEGER /* Actual number of jobs created */,
  "actual_state_tax_revenue" TEXT /* Actual new state tax revenue generated */,
  "actual_capital_investment" TEXT /* Actual capital investment */,
  "actual_state_wages" TEXT /* Actual new state wages */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_incentive_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incentive_type_id") REFERENCES incentive_types ("incentive_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incentive_types" (
  "incentive_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive type */,
  "incentive_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive type */,
  "incentive_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the incentive provided */,
  "incentive_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incentive period */,
  "incentive_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incentive period */,
  "incentive_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions that must be met to receive the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., jobs created, tax revenue) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., state official, project manager, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., contract, report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., general, action item, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
